title: Supply Chain Manager - Blue Dart Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Blue Dart Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart Global Group has an exciting opening for a Supply Chain Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Blue Dart Global Group:
Blue Dart Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Global Group!
